response.step_by_step_log: The video shows a virtual concert of '暁闇エクスデス' by '秘密結社holoX'. I searched for '"暁闇エクスデス" PandaBOY Japanese and English lyrics' and found the song title, artist, and full lyrics via Uta-net and other lyric sites. I compiled the lyrics and translation based on the search results.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance by the group holoX (comprised of characters La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Sakamata Chloe) of their song "暁闇エクスデス" (Gyouan Death), with dialogue intervals.

scenes.description: holoX performs '暁闇エクスデス' on a 3D stage. Song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「我らエデンの星を統べる者、秘密結社…」 「holoX!!」 (で、ござる～!)
「機は熟した!暁闇より現れし英霊たちよ、準備はいいか!!」
「お」"are you ready?"

ラッパッパー LaPaLaPa ラッパッパー LaPaTa LaPaTa ラッパッパー（X!!!!）
ラッパッパー LaPaLaPa ラッパッパー LaPaTa LaPaTa ラッパッパー

夜が深まる ほらダークネス
能あるタカはPONで隠す
何に従え エゴイスト
ノートにニンニン サムライガール
やる気しないけど フルベッドでしょ チェキチェキ
征服すればおｋ 切り裂く赤字 ジャキンジャキン
悪の手のひら 踊りたくなる
ほら君 気付けば ノリノリです

どうしようもない Don't, No Mine
堕ちてく運命
ならしょうがない
もう全部 塗り替えよう

Xと Xと Xと Xが 交差する真ん中で
Nextと Nextと Nextと Next 世界はもう 始まってる
(ウオオオオ オーオーオー)
飛びな 飛びな 闇が呼ぶ方へ
(ウオオオオ オーオーオー)
アウンコクの エクスデス

(Bridge dialogue omitted for space)

...
暁闇エクスデス!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"We who rule the stars of Eden, Secret Society..." "holoX!!" (De gozaru~!)
"The time is ripe! Spirits who have appeared from the dawn darkness, are you ready!!"
"Oh, are you ready?"
[Refrain]
Rappappa LaPaLaPa Rappappa LaPaTa LaPaTa Rappappa (X!!!!)
Rappappa LaPaLaPa Rappappa LaPaTa LaPaTa Rappappa

[Verse 1]
When the night deepens, behold darkness.
Hide your foolishness with PON (mistakes).
Follow what you want, egoist.
Notebook, Ninnin, Samurai Girl.
I don't feel like it, but it's a full bed, right? Check-check!
Conquer them, and cut into red ink. Jakkin, Jakkin!
The palm of evil, I want to dance.
Behold, if you notice, you're on board.
Nori-nori (having fun)!
There's nothing I can do. Don't, No Mine.
Falling fate.
There's nothing I can do.
Let's repaint everything.

[Chorus]
X and X and X and X intersection, in the middle.
Next and Next and Next and Next, the world has already begun.
(Woah-oh-oh)
Fly now, fly now, the darkness calls.
(Woah-oh-oh)
Aun-un-koku-no-X-Death.

[Bridge]
"Chaos-filled, this world, we holoX will repaint it into our color! People of the world, activate!"
"Yes My Dark!!!"
Absolute Darkness Infinity!
The stars of Eden are in my hands!

[Chorus/Outro repeats...]
